fixesApplied.description: Logo image had no max-height constraint. self-stretch + **:h-full on the logo link caused any non-horizontal image to blow up and fill the entire nav bar height.

filesChanged.note: Both ImageDropUploader (no logo placeholder) and <a> tag (logo link) updated with identical classes

fixesApplied.verification: Logo is now constrained to max 58px tall on desktop and max 26px on mobile, matching Figma proportions. object-contain ensures the image scales proportionally within the constraint.

syncStatus.note: TSX and PHP logo link classes are identical after fix

warnings: Entrypoint size limit: js/editor (302 KiB), js/screen (331 KiB)
